title: Agent Safety MCP
description: Live view of agent safety tool decisions emitted by agent-safety-mcp.
_note: Splunk Classic Dashboard XML, JSON-ified for readability. Paste the <dashboard>...</dashboard> block below into Splunk Web > Dashboards > Create New Dashboard > Classic Dashboards > Source.
xml:
Live view of agent safety tool decisions.Decisions over time (by tool)index=* sourcetype=agent_safety | timechart span=1m count by tool-24h@hnowOutcome breakdownindex=* sourcetype=agent_safety | stats count by outcome-24h@hnowDeny events (last hour)index=* sourcetype=agent_safety outcome=deny earliest=-1h | eval url=coalesce('detail.url','detail.host',"(no url)") | table _time tool url detail.reason latency_ms | sort -_time
p95 tool latency (ms)index=* sourcetype=agent_safety latency_ms=* | timechart span=5m perc95(latency_ms) by tool-24h@hnowTop denied URLs (24h)index=* sourcetype=agent_safety outcome=deny earliest=-24h | eval url=coalesce('detail.url','detail.host',"(no url)") | stats count by url | sort -count | head 20
